fileMap: internal/report/health.go — modify — add analysis import, guard loop in Health() with counted denominator
internal/report/detailed.go — modify — add analysis import, guard computeDimensionAverages and computeLanguageBreakdowns loops
internal/report/full.go — modify — add analysis import, guard buildLanguageDetail loop
internal/report/card.go — modify — guard GenerateCard loop with counted denominator (import already present)
fixApproach: Guard every records-iteration loop across the four report consumer files with `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }` at the loop body's top. For loops that use `len(records)` as a denominator for rates/scores/averages (Health, GenerateCard), introduce a `counted` integer incremented after the guard and use it instead of `len(records)`. For loops that accumulate sums and per-language totals without a total-count denominator (computeDimensionAverages, computeLanguageBreakdowns, buildLanguageDetail), the guard alone suffices since unsupported records simply won't contribute to the running sums/counts. No domain types, scorer, or pipeline files are changed. The `partitionByLanguage` helper in card.go already uses this detection mechanism and serves as a reference pattern.
steps: In internal/report/health.go Health(): add a `counted` variable; at top of records loop, guard with `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }`; increment `counted` after guard; replace `len(records)` denominator with `counted` for passRate and overallScore calculations

In internal/report/detailed.go computeDimensionAverages: at top of records loop, guard with `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }` before summing dimensions and incrementing counts
In internal/report/detailed.go computeLanguageBreakdowns: at top of records loop, guard with `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }` before per-language accumulation
In internal/report/full.go buildLanguageDetail: at top of the records loop, guard with `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }` before computing per-language sums and counts

In internal/report/card.go GenerateCard(): add a `counted` variable; at top of records loop, guard with `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }`; increment `counted` after guard; replace `len(records)` denominator with `counted` for TotalUnits and pass/average/overall score calculations
Run `go test ./... -count=1` to verify all existing tests pass and no regressions introduced
summary: Guard five aggregation loops across four report files to skip records where analysis.ForLanguage returns nil, using a counted denominator in Health and GenerateCard
